settings.review_text: As described

the parts did what they needed to do
Signaler
Perfect, especially for an elevated cabin.

Eye bolt, shaft Ø 12 mm, length 350 mm, scaffold eye, scaffold anchoring bolt.
Fast delivery, perfect, that's all I can say.
Fast delivery, good quality
As always, the products we buy perfectly meet our needs. These waterproof screws (available in several sizes) were essential for fixing the Gardebruk roofing sheets to a carport roof.
Consistent with photos

This is a solid and excellent item. It’s industrial grade for fence/gate post that looks like it’ll last a hundred years. I used this to mend a rotten post for a gate as it stands alone and it’s stronger than it looks in the picture.
Very useful, exactly as described and very sturdy.
The brackets are sturdy and don't bend during installation. There are no burrs or poorly deburred holes. Good product.
Nickel
Close to the original, does the same job for a tenth of the price
High-quality product received in record time. This is my second order!
Excellent quality and faster shipping than expected.
Quality parts at a good price, not hardware store junk.
They served their purpose well
Great

Produit très bien fini, support pour poteau 145x145mm, 2m50 de haut, pour carport.
Très bel effet.
Impeccable, very satisfied
GOOD PRODUCT
Fast delivery, good quality materials and workmanship. Dimensions are accurate.

Very well-finished product, support for a 145x145mm post, 2.50m high, for a carport.
Very nice effect.

Used to secure a kitchen island unit.
Much more practical than the brackets supplied with the unit, which would have required cutting, and I didn't have the necessary tools. It's been over a year and it's still holding.
Very good !

settings.heading: Trusted by 10K+ Customers
settings.subheading: Thousands of customers choose us for high-quality products and exceptional service.

settings.question: Do you ship across Europe?
settings.answer: Yes. We offer fast, reliable shipping across most European countries. Shipping options and delivery times are shown during checkout.

settings.question: How can I ensure that I'm purchasing the correct product?
settings.answer: To ensure you're choosing the right product, review the detailed descriptions and specifications on each product page, and feel free to reach out to our customer support team for personalized guidance. We're here to help you make the best choice for your project needs!

settings.question: How can I contact customer support?
settings.answer: You can reach us via email at support@gezu-impex.nl, through our contact form. We're available from Mon-Fri.

settings.question: What is your return policy?
settings.answer: We offer a 30-day return policy for unused items in their original packaging. Please contact our customer service team to initiate a return.

settings.question: What payment methods do you accept?
settings.answer: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, MasterCard, American Express), PayPal, Apple Pay, Google Pay, and bank transfers for larger orders.

settings.heading: Frequently asked questions!
settings.description: Explore the most frequently asked questions to help you get the best experience.
settings.contact_text: you can contact us on support@gezu-impex.nl
